3C0A: RUN: copies A90-C8F to /bin/bash400-5FF, sets DOS vectors, JMP /bin/bash917
0917: Indirect dispatch via (C08) - first call goes to map decoder
5A00: Deferred VBI: dispatches by game_state via table B30, runs sound engine, entity spawner
5A45: JMP (C0E) - indirect dispatch to state handler
5A48: State 3: title attract mode - only calls entity_update_all
5A4C: State 4: title input - updates entities, checks keyboard (any key->state 1, ESC excluded)
5AAC: Sub-state 1: wait fire release after pickup, restores colors, INC state_advance
6880: DLI: WSYNC, copies 4 colors from B7C to COLPF0-3 (status bar color split)
6895: State 1: switches display list to D00, loads colors from 112, sets CHBASE
4100: Spawn entities: RANDOM selects type/position, 5 types into 4 groups, checks spawn limits
4335: Subtract CC3-4 from POWER (11B-C) in BCD. If underflow: POWER=0, game_state=9 (game over)
1B00: Updates 4 entity groups in round-robin: G1(10), G2(3), G3(2), G4(2) = 17 total
2300: Entity AI: check tile, deposit item (5/6), navigate toward castles, break barriers, decrement score
5B00: Player 0 sprite render: clear old, check sub-state. Walk mode: auto-position near P3. Wand mode: move as cursor. Animate 4 frames, write to PMG $1420
5B6C: Clear 8 bytes of player sprite at PMG offset
5B7B: Calculate PMG write offset from player Y + 7
6A80: Player 0 position return: moves P0 toward target at +-4px/frame. Walk mode: keeps P0 near P3 (wizard). Wand mode (no stick): returns cursor toward wizard
5C00: Wand cursor (Player 0) P0PF check. Runs ONLY in wand mode (sub_state=2). Converts cursor PMG coords to tile address, checks tile interactions
1900: Scroll engine: reads joystick bits from $6C00, scrolls map via HSCROL/VSCROL. Called ONLY in walking mode (sub-state 0), NOT in wand mode
5880: Render wand/cursor using Player 3 PMG area 720 from shape data at (0),Y
5D00: Sound effect engine: 20 trigger slots ($BF00-$13) -> 4 POKEY channels. Slots grouped 5/channel. $01=trigger init, $02+=update envelope
5700: BCD->screen: converts POWER, castle counters, FOUL counts, SCORE to screen digits in status bar. Also auto-drains POWER and auto-increments SCORE by difficulty
6400: Updates status bar text lines at D80+
6900: Walking mode collision: P3PF (wizard at tile position on playfield). bit 0=entity marker ($14-$18)/wall ($0B), bit 2=mana gem ($85-86)/treasure. Also reads joystick
6C01: spawn_type_idx: current entity type index being spawned
6C05: wand_active: wand/cursor active flag (joystick bits when wand out)
6C06: move_cooldown: movement cooldown timer (8 frames between moves)
6C0A: screen_initialized: gameplay screen setup done flag
6C0E: dispatch_lo: current dispatch vector low byte
6C0F: dispatch_hi: current dispatch vector high byte
6C14: player_x: Player 0 horizontal position (wizard in walk mode, cursor in wand mode)
6C15: player_y: Player 0 vertical position (wizard in walk mode, cursor in wand mode)
6C17: wand_direction: wand movement direction index (from joystick)
6C1D: target_x: P0 auto-move target X (joy_dx_table[dir] + view_offset_x)
6C1E: target_y: P0 auto-move target Y (joy_dy_table[dir] + view_offset_y)
6C1F: wizard_move_dir: direction index for P0 movement (from wand_direction)
6C29: foul_hi: FOUL high byte (BCD, 1 digit). Net monster count (spawns - moves). Displayed on FOUL line, first 3 digits
6C2A: foul_lo: FOUL low byte (BCD, 2 digits). Net monster count
091A: Decompresses map data from E00+: packs 4 tiles/byte with 2-bit rotation into screen RAM at (8)
09A2: Level init: decode map, setup entities via /bin/bashB00, INC game_state
09AC: Alternate level init: decode map, call 500 (level renderer)
0B00: Update player cursor/missile position on screen
5500: State 2: MAIN GAMEPLAY frame - charset animation, sub-state dispatch, player sprite, scoring, key check
4380: State 5: death/restart handler. ESC=wait, any other key=game_state 2 (resume). Dead code at $4391 has abandoned S/V key checks
6500: Render current level map to screen
1400: Player 0 graphics: wizard character (walk mode) / wand cursor (wand mode)
1700: Player 3 graphics: directional indicator (walk mode) / stationary wizard marker (wand mode)
6E00: Compressed map data for current level
6B94: Wand cursor X deltas per direction (signed)
6B9E: Wand cursor Y deltas per direction (signed)
5A80: Sub-state 0 WALKING: map scrolls via scroll_engine. P0+P3 overlap as wizard character. P3PF detects tile collisions. Fire->sub 1
6A00: Sub-state 2 WAND: wizard (P3) stationary, cursor (P0) moves freely. Cursor can destroy entities, walls, collect items, reach S/V. Fire/key exits
6A30: Sub-state 3: return from wand mode - wait fire release, restore colors, state_advance=0
6A4D: Color flash effect: cycles PCOLR0 hue every 2 frames
192D: Scroll up: DEC VSCROL by 2, at boundary updates tile row pointer and INC 111
1966: Scroll down: INC VSCROL by 2, at boundary DEC 111 (map Y position)
1997: Scroll left: INC HSCROL, at boundary DEC 110/109 (map X position)
19C5: Scroll right: DEC HSCROL, at boundary INC 110/109
19F8: Subtract offset from all LMS addresses in display list when scrolling vertically
1A1D: Add offset to all LMS addresses in display list when scrolling vertically
1800: Scroll at top edge: updates 10A (map row), shifts entity data, boundary clamp
1828: Scroll at bottom edge: updates 10A, shifts entity data
1847: Scroll at left edge: updates 109 (map col), boundary clamp
1886: Add B00[Y] to screen base pointer /
1893: Subtract B00[Y] from screen base pointer /
6954: Walking mode mana gem pickup (P3PF bit 2): $85=+50 POWER,+01 SCORE. $86=+10 POWER,+20 SCORE. Treasures $8E-$91: unlock by foul_damage_hi
5C5E: Read tile at (),Y: handle empty, wall (/bin/bashB), item (4-8), entity death (E)
2100: Walking mode tile interaction (P3PF bit 0): tile $0B=wall (single-hit destroy, $50 POWER cost, becomes $86). Tiles $14-$18=entity markers (item_collect A=0, kill cost)
24FF: Calculate entity screen position from address for AI targeting
2519: Calculate distance from entity to target (castle or wizard)
1F00: Item collect dispatch. A=param (0=entity kill penalty, 1=item pickup, 2+=castle damage). Y=tile-$14. ALL interactions cost POWER
4300: Add score_delta to player SCORE ($6CC0-2, 6 digit BCD). Called on kills, gem pickups, etc.
431F: Add CC3-4 to POWER (11B-C) in BCD
6300: S-shield: builds barrier at wizard position. Strength=min(power_digit,3). Tile $E0-$E2. Cost from $6BDE table
5600: Manages spell_flag: 0=check P0PL for Player 2 touch, 1=charging(fire held), 2=JMP shield_build, 3=releasing. NOT keyboard triggered
5653: Wand cursor (P0) collides with Player 2 (S/V activation sprites). Y<$64->S (shield build), Y>=$64->V (tracking). Requires wand mode to reach P2
5672: V-shield: places stationary $CD tracking tile at BB+$81. Monsters walking onto $CD are auto-destroyed. Tile does NOT move
64C0: Initialize hardware: set VVBLKD, VDSLST, PMBASE=0, GRACTL=/bin/bash3, PRIOR=/bin/bash1, colors
6480: State 9: game over animation - DEC PCOLR3, compare/update high score at 835/849
6C00: scroll_direction: joystick direction bits for scroll engine (U/D/L/R = bits 0-3)
6C02: game_over_timer: countdown for game over animation
6C08: init_dispatch_lo: initial dispatch vector lo (for game_init indirect JMP)
6C10: map_decode_counter: map decoder bit counter (counts down 4->0)
6C12: map_decode_save_y: saved Y during map decode
6C13: map_decode_col: current column in map decode (0-F)
6C20: missile_offset: missile PMG Y offset for cursor display
6C22: first_tile: first tile value for map boundary fill
6C23: power_gem_value: BCD value of current power gem pickup
6CC0: score_total_hi: player SCORE high byte (BCD). Displayed on SCORE line (6 digits, inverse). Grows with kills, gem collections, all player activity
6CC3: score_delta_hi: score delta high (temporary for add/subtract)
6CC7: foul_damage_hi: FOUL damage counter high byte (BCD). Total monster movement steps. Displayed on FOUL line, last 4 digits
6CC8: foul_damage_lo: FOUL damage counter low byte (BCD)
5100: wizard_y_tile: wizard Y position in tile coordinates (for PMG)
5101: wizard_x_tile: wizard X position in tile coordinates (HPOSP3)
5102: view_offset_y: current view Y offset (scroll position)
5103: view_offset_x: current view X offset (scroll position)
5104: entity_grp1_idx: entity group 1 circular buffer index
5105: entity_grp2_idx: entity group 2 circular buffer index
5106: entity_grp3_idx: entity group 3 circular buffer index
5107: entity_grp4_idx: entity group 4 circular buffer index
5109: map_col: current map column (coarse scroll X)
510A: map_row: current map row (coarse scroll Y)
510B: spawn_timer_0: spawn countdown timer for entity type 0
5110: map_x_fine: fine map X position for scroll boundary
5111: map_y_fine: fine map Y position for scroll boundary
511A: difficulty: difficulty level (1-9, from title select. Controls entity speed and spawn rates)
511B: power_hi: POWER counter high BCD byte
511C: power_lo: POWER counter low BCD byte
511E: chbase_current: current character base for animation
5120: spawn_interval: frames between entity spawn attempts (reset from 1A0)
5121: entity_count_0: alive count for entity type 0
5122: entity_count_1: alive count for entity type 1
5123: entity_count_2: alive count for entity type 2
5124: entity_count_3: alive count for entity type 3
5125: entity_count_4: alive count for entity type 4
512A: wall_hits_remaining: hits remaining to destroy current wall tile
512B: entity_kill_count: kill counter, decremented per kill. When 0: damages castle tiles as penalty
512C: pcolr2_dynamic: dynamic PCOLR2 value (changes with state)
6B00: Scroll offset table: 0 (128 bytes per row) and /bin/bash1 (1 byte per column)
6B02: Wand shape pointers: 8 directions x 2 bytes each -> 9xx shape data
6B28: Player animation frame pointers: 4 frames x 2 bytes
6B30: Main state dispatch table: 10 states x 2 bytes (state -> handler address)
6B44: Entity AI direction mapping: converts compass bits to movement direction index
6B50: Entity AI speed multipliers per type
6B80: Gameplay sub-state dispatch: walk/wait/wand/return + death sub-states
6BA8: Colors for map view mode (M key)
6BAB: Castle screen memory addresses: 3 castles x 2 bytes
6BB3: Castle positions in map coordinates: 3 castles x 2 bytes (for entity AI targeting)
6BBC: Entity position change deltas per direction (unsigned, 0=0 for half-tile)
6BC6: Entity movement sign table: 0=add, nonzero=subtract for each direction
6BDA: Probability of entity breaking barrier per entity group (higher=harder to break)
6BDE: S shield building cost in POWER per strength level (BCD)
6BEC: Castle damage cost table: BCD amounts per entity group index
6BF1: Rewards table (BCD): power gained from castle defense actions
6BF9: Power gained when wizard picks up castle items (5-6)
4408: Sprite shape data for wizard, wand, monsters etc (bitmap patterns)
5000: Display list for map overview (M key): mode /bin/bashD = 160x2 graphics, LMS=
6849: Last score: 6 BCD bytes (compared against high score on game over)
6D80: Status bar screen memory: FOUL xxx, POWER xxxx, CASTLE xx xx xx, SCORE xxxxxxxx
5D62: JMP ($6C98) - indirect call to sound init or update routine
5D65: Sound init routine pointers: 20 entries x 2 bytes (slot 0-19)
5D8D: Sound update routine pointers: 20 entries x 2 bytes (called each frame while playing)
1B04: entity_update_all: $A2=$14 for group 1 (entity type marker = item tile $14)
5DB5: SFX slot 0: monster spawn/approach warning. Ch1: AUDC1=$8F, AUDF1=$64. Decaying random tone
5DD6: SFX slot 5: castle supply $85 collected (ring pickup). Ch2: AUDC2=$AF, AUDF2=$F0 sweep down
5DE6: SFX slot 6: castle supply $86 collected (ring pickup). Ch2: AUDC2=$CF, AUDF2=$28 random modulation
5DFA: SFX slot 8: entity killed by cursor or item collected. Ch2: AUDC2=$EF, sweep up from $32 to $46
5E18: SFX slot 10: tracking tile ($CD) triggered by monster. Ch3: AUDC3=$EF, random freq + decay
5E28: SFX slot 11: power gem pickup from map. Ch3: AUDC3=$EF, warble effect with period=3
5E3B: SFX slot 12: entity killed by cursor (flash effect). Ch3: AUDC3=$4F, AUDF3=$50, timed decay
5E4E: SFX slot 13: shield barrier built (S action). Ch3: AUDC3 sweep up +2/frame, AUDF3=$0A
5E68: SFX slot 15: treasure tile collected ($8E-$91). Ch4: AUDC4=$AF, random freq, warble period=3
5E7D: SFX slot 16: alarm/castle danger. Ch4: AUDC4=$4F, AUDF4=$00, freq sweep up 10 steps
4391: DEAD CODE: unreachable gameplay handler variant. Branches to sprite data at $4414/$4424. Contains S($3E)/V($10) key checks that were likely abandoned during development
5B18: Wand mode cursor movement: joystick moves cursor (P0) at 4px/frame via wand_dx/dy tables. Map stays fixed. Cursor interacts with tiles via P0PF
5CCD: Entity killed by cursor: COLOR0=$0E, sound $BF0C, SCORE += 00:00:50, POWER -= 00:10 (BCD). DEC $512B kill counter
5C9D: Kill counter exhausted: $512B wrapped to 0. Damages own castle tiles at $6BAB address. Penalty for excessive killing
000C: Tile $0C: boundary wall. Blocks entities, stops tracking markers. Forms vertical dividers on the open map
